title: Product sync — 2026-06-08
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-06-08
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Sunrise Bank escalated API & Webhooks problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Real-time cursor presence' across accounts.
- Eng notes API & Webhooks generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Real-time cursor presence' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate API & Webhooks performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Sunrise Bank.
